utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each section is fully specified: the property section includes type, size, location, price, features, and move-in date; financing includes mortgage details, down payment, interest rate, term, fees, and approval timeline; legal_services includes service name, cost, duration, completion date, and list of services; moving_services includes service level, cost, list of tasks, scheduled date, and special handling; setup_services includes type of package, cost, services included, timeline, and activation date; total_budget includes a full cost breakdown with subtotals, grand total, currency, and payment schedule. All items are present and detailed according to the format requirements.

The financing arrangement fee of CAD $1,200 matches the 'Traditional Mortgage' option. The selected legal service is explicitly 'Premium Legal Package' (CAD $1,200).
